description: College baseball sabermetrics plugin hooks — validate stat inputs and format outputs

hooks.command: node -e "const d=JSON.parse(process.env.TOOL_INPUT||'{}'); const errs=[]; if(d.metric && !['wOBA','FIP','wRC+','BABIP','ISO','xFIP','CSW%'].includes(d.metric)) errs.push('Unknown metric: '+d.metric); if(errs.length){console.error(JSON.stringify({error:errs.join(', ')})); process.exit(1);} console.log(JSON.stringify({status:'ok'}));"
